title: Anthropic Just Became the First AI Lab to Turn a Profit
script: For 5 years Anthropic burned billions racing OpenAI. This quarter, the race changed. Anthropic is projecting its first-ever operating profit — $559 million — on $10.9 billion in Q2 revenue. That's 130 percent growth in a single quarter. Claude Code alone crossed 1 billion in annualized revenue just 6 months after launch. If the numbers land, Anthropic becomes the first frontier AI lab ever to turn a quarterly profit. The startup that trained Claude just became a real business.
